channel.title: IT Support on Cozy Cafe Corner
channel.description: Recent content in IT Support on Cozy Cafe Corner

item.title: Apple Containers 1.0: What It Means for macOS, Docker, and Modern IT Workflows
item.description:
Apple Containers 1.0: What It Means for macOS, Docker, and Modern IT Workflows

Overview

Apple recently released Apple Containers 1.0, introducing a native container runtime for macOS.

item.title: How to Disable Automatic Startup When Opening the Lid on Apple Silicon Macs
item.description:
Overview

Apple Silicon MacBooks are designed to provide a seamless user experience.

On modern MacBook models equipped with Apple M-series processors and recent versions of macOS, the system will automatically power on when:
